name: Disney+
description: Subscription video-on-demand streaming service from The Walt Disney Company featuring Disney, Pixar, Marvel, Star Wars and National Geographic content.

years.notes: Launch logo (November 2019). Wordmark + plus mark and arc with radial blue gradient. Intrinsically wide mark — vertically centered inside 24x24 viewBox.
March 2024 refresh — redrawn arc and tighter '+' geometry, print variant in solid deep blue. Intrinsically wide mark — vertically centered inside 24x24 viewBox.

notes: Disney+ wordmark is intrinsically non-square (~1.8:1 aspect). Per svg.md §1.1, scaled and vertically centered inside the 24x24 viewBox. Parent 'disney' brand is not yet in the catalog, so the 'parent' field is omitted; add it once disney/ is created.
